# terrible_community_hrobot_server (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `server_number` (Number) The server number of the server to update.

### Optional

- `server_name` (String) The server's name. If this option is not provided, it will not be adjusted.

### Read-Only

- `server` (String) Information on the server.
